title: Would you Rather?
description: Would You Rather is the ultimate group game to play with friends! This party app contains over 120 of the best Would You Rather questions. * Perfect group party game to play with friends. * Great game for playing with groups of friends and family * Works offline making it the perfect road trip game to play in the car *Hundreds of difficult Would You Rather clean and dirty questions await for your friends and family! Can you answer them all?
